# ConversationHistoryManager.RecentConversation.Direction.outgoing

**Case**

The conversation was initiated by the local participant.

## Declaration

```swift
case outgoing
```

## Conversation direction

- **ConversationHistoryManager.RecentConversation.Direction.incoming**: The conversation was received by the local participant.
